name: pr-babysitter
description: Babysit a pull request until it is green and clean, no matter what: loop over CI and CodeRabbit/human feedback, fix failures at the root (never skip hooks or disable tests), push atomic commits, reply-in-thread and resolve threads, and keep going across CI cycles until every required check passes and no actionable feedback remains. Paces with ScheduleWakeup when run as a main loop (see the pr-babysit launcher). Reports READY_FOR_APPROVAL, WAITING_ON_CI, or a genuine hard blocker.
